graphId.description: The source graph identifier of the cancelled export task.

roleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that will allow the exporting of data to the destination.

taskId.description: The unique identifier of the export task.

status.description: The current status of the export task. The status is CANCELLING when the export task is cancelled.

format.description: The format of the cancelled export task.

destination.description: The Amazon S3 URI of the cancelled export task where data will be exported to.

kmsKeyIdentifier.description: The KMS key identifier of the cancelled export task.

parquetType.description: The parquet type of the cancelled export task.

statusReason.description: The reason that the export task has this status value.

graphId.description: The unique identifier of the Neptune Analytics graph.

taskId.description: The unique identifier of the import task.

source.description: A URL identifying to the location of the data to be imported. This can be an Amazon S3 path, or can point to a Neptune database endpoint or snapshot.

format.description: Specifies the format of S3 data to be imported. Valid values are CSV, which identifies the Gremlin CSV format or OPENCYPHER, which identies the openCypher load format.

parquetType.description: The parquet type of the cancelled import task.

roleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that will allow access to the data that is to be imported.

status.description: Current status of the task. Status is CANCELLING when the import task is cancelled.

name.description:
The graph name. For example: my-graph-1.

The name must contain from 1 to 63 letters, numbers, or hyphens, and its first character must be a letter. It cannot end with a hyphen or contain two consecutive hyphens. Only lowercase letters are allowed.

createTime.description: The time when the graph was created.

provisionedMemory.description:
The provisioned memory-optimized Neptune Capacity Units (m-NCUs) to use for the graph.

Min = 16

publicConnectivity.description:
Specifies whether or not the graph can be reachable over the internet. All access to graphs is IAM authenticated.

If enabling public connectivity for the first time, there will be a delay while it is enabled.

vectorSearchConfiguration.description: The vector-search configuration for the graph, which specifies the vector dimension to use in the vector index, if any.

replicaCount.description:
The number of replicas in other AZs.

Default: If not specified, the default value is 1.

kmsKeyIdentifier.description: Specifies the KMS key used to encrypt data in the new graph.

deletionProtection.description: A value that indicates whether the graph has deletion protection enabled. The graph can't be deleted when deletion protection is enabled.

buildNumber.description: The build number of the graph software.

sourceGraphId.description: The Id of the Neptune Analytics graph from which the snapshot is created.

kmsKeyIdentifier.description: The ID of the KMS key used to encrypt and decrypt graph data.

graphId.description: The unique identifier of the Neptune Analytics graph.

taskId.description: The unique identifier of the import task.

source.description: A URL identifying to the location of the data to be imported. This can be an Amazon S3 path, or can point to a Neptune database endpoint or snapshot.

format.description: Specifies the format of S3 data to be imported. Valid values are CSV, which identifies the Gremlin CSV format, OPENCYPHER, which identifies the openCypher load format, or ntriples, which identifies the RDF n-triples format.

parquetType.description: The parquet type of the import task.

roleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that will allow access to the data that is to be imported.

importOptions.description: Contains options for controlling the import process. For example, if the failOnError key is set to false, the import skips problem data and attempts to continue (whereas if set to true, the default, or if omitted, the import operation halts immediately when an error is encountered.

vpcId.description: VPC in which the private graph endpoint is created.

subnetIds.description: Subnets in which the private graph endpoint ENIs are created.

vpcEndpointId.description: Endpoint ID of the prviate grpah endpoint.

statusReason.description: The reason for the status of the graph.

createTime.description: The time at which the graph was created.

provisionedMemory.description: The number of memory-optimized Neptune Capacity Units (m-NCUs) allocated to the graph.

publicConnectivity.description: If true, the graph has a public endpoint, otherwise not.

vectorSearchConfiguration.description: Specifies the number of dimensions for vector embeddings loaded into the graph. Max = 65535

replicaCount.description: The number of replicas for the graph.

kmsKeyIdentifier.description: The ID of the KMS key used to encrypt and decrypt graph data.

sourceSnapshotId.description: The ID of the snapshot from which the graph was created, if the graph was recovered from a snapshot.

deletionProtection.description: If true, deletion protection was enabled for the graph.

buildNumber.description: The build number associated with the graph.

id.description: The unique identifier of the graph snapshot.

name.description:
The snapshot name. For example: my-snapshot-1.

The name must contain from 1 to 63 letters, numbers, or hyphens, and its first character must be a letter. It cannot end with a hyphen or contain two consecutive hyphens. Only lowercase letters are allowed.

sourceGraphId.description: The graph identifier for the graph from which the snapshot was created.

snapshotCreateTime.description: The time when the snapshot was created.

kmsKeyIdentifier.description: The ID of the KMS key used to encrypt and decrypt the snapshot.

vpcId.description: The ID of the VPC where the private endpoint was deleted.

vpcEndpointId.description: The ID of the VPC endpoint that was deleted.

statusReason.description: The reason that the graph has this status.

provisionedMemory.description: The number of memory-optimized Neptune Capacity Units (m-NCUs) allocated to the graph.

kmsKeyIdentifier.description: The ID of the KMS key used to encrypt and decrypt graph data.

sourceSnapshotId.description: The ID of the snapshot from which the graph was created, if any.

deletionProtection.description: If true, deletion protection is enabled for the graph.
